title: Harvey & Mason Set Of 10 Christmas Crackers Santa And Reindeer White And Blue Festive Table Decor Xmas Family Fun
features: ECO-FRIENDLY: Reduce waste this holiday season with these eco-friendly Christmas crackers. All packaging, crackers and gifts are fully recyclable!
WHAT'S INCLUDED: The box includes 10 luxury Christmas Crackers, finished with a raffia ribbon. Each cracker is filled with a gift, hat and motto.

DESIGN: This enchanting design in blue and white showcases a winter theme, adorned with delicate snowflakes throughout. At the heart of the design, you'll find charming Santa Claus and Friends characters, adding a delightful touch to the festive scene. Perfect for creating a whimsical and joyful atmosphere during the holiday season.
GIFTS: Each cracker contains a Christmas themed paper gift such as a jigsaw, origami, sudoku and more! Each gift is fully recyclable. (gifts may vary).
MEASUREMENTS: Each cracker measures: 30.48cm/12inch. Packaging and cracker shell are 100% recyclable & plastic-free.
description: Product Description CHRISTMAS : Add the final touches to your Christmas dining table this festive period with these exquisite Christmas crackers, guaranteed fun for all the family. WHAT'S INCLUDED: Each box includes 10 luxury Christmas Crackers, finished with a ribbon. Each cracker is filled with a gift, hat and motto. GIFTS INCLUDED : Each cracker contains a novelty, hat, motto, and snap. These beautiful crackers are perfect for keeping all the family entertained around the Christmas table. MEASUREMENTS: Each cracker measures: 30.48cm/12inch.
